name: Swetha Yarlagadda
bio: Swetha Yarlagadda is a seasoned cybersecurity leader and currently the Director of Pen Testing and Vulnerability Management within Comcast's Global Cybersecurity Org. With over 15 years of experience in various cybersecurity domains, Swetha has built and led high-performing teams that help organizations uncover vulnerabilities before attackers do. She earned her Bachelor's degree from Osmania University in India where she developed a deep interest in communication systems and network technologies. Pursuing her passion further, Swetha moved to the United States to complete her Master's degree in Telecommunications and Networking from the University of Pennsylvania. She resides in the suburbs of Philadelphia with her two children, balancing a dynamic career in cybersecurity with the joys of motherhood. She is currently serving on the TechWomen Global Advisory Council and is a member of the Executive Women's Forum and actively participates in Mentorship programs.
